mapper.sql: pc.id AS purchaseId, pc.product_id AS productId, c.name AS brandName, p.name AS productName, pc.quantity || '개 · ' || TO_CHAR(pc.created_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') || ' 구매' AS optionName, pp.picture_saved_location AS productImageUrl

FROM purchases pc JOIN products p ON p.id = pc.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) WHERE pc.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM reviews r WHERE r.purchase_id = pc.id AND r.deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.product_id AS productId, r.purchase_id AS purchaseId, u.name AS reviewerName, r.rating, r.content, r.img_src AS imgSrc, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
AND pc.product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY pc.created_at DESC, pc.id DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE purchase_id = #{purchaseId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews ( user_id, product_id, purchase_id, rating, content, img_src, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, #{purchaseId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{imgSrc}, SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP )
